query: SELECT DISTINCT JSON_UNQUOTE(jt.val) as valor FROM ferias_colaboradores, JSON_TABLE(dias, '$.*' COLUMNS (val VARCHAR(50) PATH '$')) AS jt WHERE uploadId = (SELECT id FROM ferias_uploads ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) LIMIT 20;
